label: Recorded crime incidents classified as murder
note:
Data may be subject to revision. Based on data extracted 01 March 2026.[b]
The ’Under Reservation’ designation has been removed from Recorded Crime Statistics.[/b]
For further information please see our [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/methods/crime/liftingofunderreservationcategorisationforrecordedcrimestatisticsfaq/]Lifting of Under Reservation categorisation for Recorded Crime Statistics FAQ page[/url] on our website.
Recorded crime rate is the number of recorded crime incidents relative to the population, expressed as a rate per 100,000 people. Population data is based on latest Census of Population and updated annually by CSO Population estimates. See [url=product/PME]Annual Population Estimates[/url].
08 September 2025 – The classification code for Murder was corrected from 111 to 0111.
For more information, please go to the [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/statistics/crimeandjustice/recordedcrime/]statistical release page[/url] on our website.
